ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user's account is active */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campus where the user is primarily based */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the admin who created the account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the user's account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_campus_id FOREIGN KEY ("campus_id") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the user's profile picture */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio or description of the user */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* User's preferred language for communication */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's preferred timezone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is a default role */,
  "can_manage_users" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can manage other users */,
  "can_manage_roles" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can manage roles */,
  "can_access_reports" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can access advanced reports */,
  "can_access_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role has administrative access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was assigned the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the user's role assignment ends */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the admin who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the login was successful */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for login */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographic location from which the user logged in */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific resource accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource accessed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in seconds */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the activity was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific resource accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campuses" (
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus */,
  "campus_name" TEXT /* Name of the campus */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the campus */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the campus */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the campus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campus_id")
)
